Module com.escriturarapida.miniproyectopoo
Package com.escriturarapida.miniproyectopoo.model

Class Game

java.lang.Object
com.escriturarapida.miniproyectopoo.model.Game
public class Game extends Object
Represents the core game logic and state for the Fast Typing Game. This class is responsible for managing the internal state of the game, including the current level, the number of completed levels, the time limit for each round, and whether the game has finished. The difficulty of the game increases progressively. Every five completed levels the time limit is reduced, making the game more challenging for the player. This class does not interact with the user interface directly. Instead, it is used by the controller layer to manage the game rules.
Version:
1.0
Author:
Abrahan Ybañez 2418114-3743

  • Constructor Details

    • Game

      public Game()
      Creates a new game with default initial values.

  • Method Details

    • reset

      public void reset()
      Resets the whole game to its initial state. This method restores all attributes to their default values: level 1, zero completed levels, the initial time limit, an empty target text, and the game marked as active.

    • setCurrentText

      public void setCurrentText(String currentText)
      Sets the target text that the player must type in the current round.
      Parameters:
      currentText - the text that must be typed by the player

    • advanceLevel

      public void advanceLevel()
      Advances the game to the next level after a successful attempt. This method increments the number of completed levels and the current level. Additionally, every five completed levels the available time is reduced to increase the difficulty of the game. The minimum allowed time limit is 2 seconds.

    • endGame

      public void endGame()
      Marks the game as finished.

    • getCurrentLevel

      public int getCurrentLevel()
      Returns the current level of the game.
      Returns:
      current level number

    • getCompletedLevels

      public int getCompletedLevels()
      Returns the amount of completed levels by the player.
      Returns:
      completed levels

    • getCurrentTimeLimit

      public int getCurrentTimeLimit()
      Returns the current time limit for the level.
      Returns:
      current time limit in seconds

    • getCurrentText

      public String getCurrentText()
      Returns the target text for the current round.
      Returns:
      the text the player must type

    • isGameOver

      public boolean isGameOver()
      Indicates whether the game is over.
      Returns:
      true if the game is over; false otherwise
